doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual is dedicated to Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, and the document uses modern "best practices" language not found in the official manual.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The official EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 is titled "Retaliation," whereas age discrimination is primarily addressed in Section 2 (Threshold Issues) and specific ADEA guidance documents.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual is dedicated to Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, and the document uses modern "best practices" language not found in the official manual.
